mapper.select: SELECT m.authrt_id, m.prgrm_id, m.inq_authrt_yn, m.inpt_authrt_yn, m.use_bgng_dt, m.use_end_dt, m.frst_reg_dt, m.frst_reg_user_id, m.last_chg_dt, m.last_chg_user_id, p.prgrm_nm, p.sys_se_cd FROM com.tn_sys_authrt_prgrm_mpng m JOIN com.tn_prgrm p ON p.prgrm_id = m.prgrm_id AND NOW() BETWEEN p.use_bgng_dt AND p.use_end_dt WHERE m.authrt_id = #{authrtId} AND NOW() BETWEEN m.use_bgng_dt AND m.use_end_dt ORDER BY p.sys_se_cd, m.prgrm_id

SELECT m.authrt_id, m.prgrm_id, m.inq_authrt_yn, m.inpt_authrt_yn, m.use_bgng_dt, m.use_end_dt, m.frst_reg_dt, m.frst_reg_user_id, m.last_chg_dt, m.last_chg_user_id, p.prgrm_nm, p.sys_se_cd FROM com.tn_sys_authrt_prgrm_mpng m JOIN com.tn_prgrm p ON p.prgrm_id = m.prgrm_id AND NOW() BETWEEN p.use_bgng_dt AND p.use_end_dt WHERE m.prgrm_id = #{prgrmId} AND NOW() BETWEEN m.use_bgng_dt AND m.use_end_dt ORDER BY m.authrt_id

SELECT authrt_id, prgrm_id, inq_authrt_yn, inpt_authrt_yn, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id FROM com.tn_sys_authrt_prgrm_mpng WHERE authrt_id = #{authrtId} AND prgrm_id = #{prgrmId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO com.tn_sys_authrt_prgrm_mpng (authrt_id, prgrm_id, inq_authrt_yn, inpt_authrt_yn, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{authrtId}, #{prgrmId}, #{inqAuthrtYn}, #{inptAuthrtYn}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
